roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S PC17(B) MOTION REDUCE CHARGE FILED

/CAL: DEFT'S PC 17(B) MOTION/DAWT/X: DEFENSE WITHDRAWS PEREMPTORY CHALLENGE/MO GRTD/X:THE COURT GRANTS MOTION FOR MISDEMEANOR REDUCTION PURSUANT TO PC 17(B),/CTORD: CHARGE(S) REDUCED FROM A FELONY TO A MISDEMEANOR /X:ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN COURT,/

/CAL:SENTENCING/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 168 D/CTS:168/WS/RESTR/SAORD/SA2:2335 MARKET ST, SAN FRANCISCO, CA/SAORD3/X:DEFENDANT SHALL NOT POSSESS ANYBURGLARY TOOL/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/IND/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/X:UPON SUCCESSFUL COMPLETION OF ONE YEAR OF PROBATION,DEFENDANT MAY PETITION FOR A 17B MOTION FOR A MISDEMEANOR REDUCTION UPON FILING OF THE APPROPRIATE PAPERWORK/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING IS VACATED,/X:COURT GRANTSTHE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 4, PC 459, AFELONY SECOND DEGREE,/FAWC/IRRC/  /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:4/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:06-16-20/PPRFCUST/REMA/ARBUCKLE/CONTD:PSR AND SENTENCE/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/LDPX:05-26-20 (60TH)/TE:1 HOUR/X:CAUSE IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 27, FORTHWITH; TO BE HEARD BEFORE JUDGE CHARLES CROMPTON, FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING,/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX 05-26-20/987,2/SAORD/SA2 2335 MARKET ST, SF/SAORD3/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ONPRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITHA GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE:45 MINS/DOP/
